title: Python Developer Intern
responsibilities: Write clean, maintainable Python code for backend services
Build and consume REST APIs
Write unit tests and participate in code reviews
Debug and fix issues in existing modules
Collaborate with senior engineers on feature design
qualifications: Pursuing B.Tech/B.E. in CSE, IT, or related field
Strong fundamentals in Python and data structures
Familiarity with Git-based version control
Good problem-solving and debugging skills
content: Python Developer Intern role for engineering graduates pursuing B.Tech/B.E. in Computer Science or related fields. The intern will write backend code in Python, build and consume REST APIs, write unit tests, and debug issues in existing modules under the mentorship of senior engineers. Required skills include strong Python fundamentals, data structures, object-oriented programming, Git, and REST APIs. Preferred but not mandatory: FastAPI, Flask, SQL, and Docker. Minimum CGPA requirement is 7.0. The internship runs for 6 months in hybrid mode out of Indore, Madhya Pradesh, with a stipend range of ₹15,000 to ₹25,000 per month and 4 openings. Top performers may receive a pre-placement offer at the end of the internship.

title: Frontend Developer Intern
responsibilities: Build responsive, accessible UI components in React
Translate Figma designs into pixel-accurate web pages
Optimize page performance and Core Web Vitals
Integrate frontend with REST/GraphQL APIs
Write component-level tests
qualifications: Pursuing B.Tech/B.E./BCA in CS or related discipline
Solid understanding of HTML, CSS, and modern JavaScript (ES6+)
Hands-on experience with React through coursework or personal projects
An eye for UI detail and responsive layouts
perks: Access to design system and component library
content: Frontend Developer Intern position for students pursuing B.Tech/B.E./BCA. The role involves building responsive, accessible UI components using React, converting Figma designs into pixel-accurate web pages, integrating with REST and GraphQL APIs, and optimizing page performance and Core Web Vitals. Required skills are HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, and responsive design. Preferred skills include TypeScript, Next.js, Tailwind CSS, and Redux. Minimum CGPA is 6.5. This is a fully remote, 6-month internship based out of Bengaluru, Karnataka, paying ₹18,000 to ₹28,000 per month, with 3 openings.

title: Data Analyst Intern
responsibilities: Write SQL queries to extract and aggregate business data
Build dashboards and reports for stakeholders
Perform exploratory data analysis on large datasets
Support A/B test design and result interpretation
Document data definitions and analysis methodology
qualifications: Pursuing B.Tech/B.Sc/BCA/B.Com with strong quantitative aptitude
Comfortable writing SQL joins, aggregations, and subqueries
Working knowledge of statistics (mean, variance, hypothesis testing)
Basic scripting ability in Python or R is a plus
perks: Hands-on exposure to production data pipelines
Daily stand-ups with the analytics team
content: Data Analyst Intern role focused on extracting insights from business data. Responsibilities include writing SQL queries to aggregate data, building dashboards for stakeholders, performing exploratory data analysis, supporting A/B testing, and documenting data definitions. Required skills are SQL, Excel, statistics, data visualization, and Python. Preferred skills include Pandas, Power BI, Tableau, and A/B testing experience. Minimum CGPA is 6.5. This is an onsite, 4-month internship in Pune, Maharashtra, paying ₹12,000 to ₹20,000 per month, with 5 openings.

title: AI/ML Intern
responsibilities: Implement and evaluate machine learning models
Preprocess and clean datasets for training
Run experiments and track results using ML tooling
Read and summarize relevant research papers
Assist in deploying models behind simple APIs
qualifications: Pursuing B.Tech/M.Tech in CS, AI/ML, or a related discipline
Strong grasp of linear algebra, probability, and ML fundamentals
Hands-on project experience with scikit-learn or a deep learning framework
Comfortable reading technical documentation and papers
perks: Co-authorship opportunity on internal research notes
Pre-placement offer track for top performers
content: AI/ML Intern role for students with strong machine learning fundamentals. The intern will implement and evaluate ML models, preprocess datasets, run experiments, read research papers, and assist in deploying models behind simple APIs. Required skills are Python, machine learning, NumPy, Pandas, and scikit-learn. Preferred skills include PyTorch, TensorFlow, NLP, and LangChain. Minimum CGPA is 7.5, reflecting the more research-oriented nature of this role. This is a hybrid, 6-month internship in Hyderabad, Telangana, paying ₹20,000 to ₹35,000 per month, with 2 openings.

title: Software Engineer Intern
responsibilities: Design and implement features across the backend stack
Write efficient, well-tested code following team conventions
Participate in code reviews and sprint planning
Debug production issues with guidance from senior engineers
Contribute to technical design documents
qualifications: Pursuing B.Tech/B.E. in CSE, IT, or related field
Strong fundamentals in data structures, algorithms, and OOP
Proficiency in at least one of Java, Python, or C++
Comfortable with Git-based collaborative workflows
perks: Access to internal engineering wiki and tooling
content: Software Engineer Intern role covering general backend feature development. Responsibilities include designing and implementing features, writing efficient and tested code, participating in code reviews and sprint planning, and contributing to technical design documents. Required skills are data structures and algorithms, object-oriented programming, Git, SQL, and proficiency in at least one of Java, Python, or C++. Preferred skills include system design basics, Docker, CI/CD, and microservices. Minimum CGPA is 7.0. This is an onsite, 6-month internship in Gurugram, Haryana, paying ₹20,000 to ₹30,000 per month, with 6 openings.
